While GLM-4.6 is recognized as a very strong open-source model and reportedly ranks 4th on the LMArena leaderboard, it is still trailing behind the very top proprietary models (such as those from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). Given the knowledge cutoff date of October 26, 2025, there are only five days left until the resolution date. It is exceedingly rare for a model to jump from 4th to 1st place organically within a few days without a massive new model release, and there are no reports of a new flagship model release from Z.ai right before the deadline. The Polymarket price for this specific outcome was 0.00 as of mid-October, heavily suggesting that market participants view this specific outcome as practically impossible. Therefore, the probability of Z.ai taking the number one spot by October 31 is extremely low, and I estimate it at the lower bound of 0.02.
